caption: The video features a woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green top with floral embroidery around the neckline. She is seated against a plain black background, which provides a stark contrast to her attire. The woman appears to be speaking or presenting, as suggested by the microphone clipped to her top. Her expression changes subtly between the frames, indicating she is engaged in delivering her message. The setting suggests a formal or educational context, possibly a lecture or an interview, given the professional appearance and the presence of the microphone. The logo in the bottom left corner hints that this might be part of an NPTEL (National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning) presentation.
